overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic bathroom interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The space features neon cyan and purple lighting, dark marble floors, high-end fixtures, and tropical plants. The camera smoothly pans through the room examining the vanity, toilet, and ends at a rainy window with purple exterior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk luxury bathroom vanity with neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit bathroom, observing the modern vanity and tropical plants on the left

entered.detail: large rectangular mirror with rounded corners framed by cyan neon lights
vertical cyan neon strips framing the vanity mirror and horizontal strips under the counter
large tropical fern plants in a planter box along the left wall
dark purple marble flooring with subtle reflective properties
transparent glass partition wall separating the shower area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic bathroom vanity bathed in cyan neon light. The camera moves forward and right, revealing dark marble floors and tropical ferns on the left. The large mirror and illuminated strips dominate the view as the space transitions toward a toilet alcove.

scene_state.functional_zone: toilet alcove with gold accents and light marble flooring

events.description: reaches the futuristic toilet and turns around to head back toward the main bathroom area

agents.ego_description: approaching the white futuristic toilet and examining the gold-accented alcove before turning back

entered.detail: sleek white ceramic toilet with a modern squared design
tall gold-colored metal stand holding a potted plant next to the toilet
light beige marble flooring with gold veining distinct from the dark main floor
low dark bench against the wall in the transition area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a brighter alcove featuring a futuristic white toilet and light marble floors with gold accents. After a brief observation, the camera turns around, leaving the vanity elements behind and preparing to return to the main bathroom space.

scene_state.functional_zone: shower and vanity area with glass partitions

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the vanity area, examining wall-mounted shower controls and approaching the countertop

entered.detail: large rectangular mirror with rounded corners framed by cyan neon lights
vertical cyan neon strips framing the vanity
dark purple marble flooring returning to view
transparent glass partition wall with metallic frame
wall-mounted digital shower control panel with display
stack of folded gray towels on the vanity counter
small cans with CYBER branding on the vanity countertop

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main bathroom area, the camera passes glass shower enclosures and wall-mounted controls. The dark marble floor reappears as the camera approaches the vanity, revealing folded towels and branded cans on the countertop before moving in for a closer look.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical plant corner with rainy window view

events.description: approaches the large window revealing heavy rain and intense purple neon light from the exterior

agents.ego_description: inspecting the vanity items up close then moving past the tropical plants toward the rainy window

entered.detail: large tropical fern plants now viewed from the opposite side near the window
large window showing heavy rainfall and blurred purple exterior lights
intense purple neon glow visible through the rain-streaked window

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the vanity items then shifts left toward the tropical plants. As it approaches the window, the scene reveals a dramatic view of heavy rain and purple neon lighting from the cyberpunk city outside, creating a moody atmosphere distinct from the interior cyan lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-end futuristic bathroom that shifts from a cyan-lit interior to a moody, rain-streaked view of a cyberpunk city. It begins at a vanity bathed in cyan neon light, gliding over dark marble floors and tropical ferns as the perspective transitions toward a brightly lit toilet alcove featuring white fixtures and gold accents. After pivoting away from the alcove, the camera returns to the main area, passing glass shower enclosures and wall-mounted controls before drifting back toward the vanity to reveal folded towels and branded cans. The movement then shifts left toward the lush tropical plants, finally approaching a window where the interior glow gives way to the dramatic sight of heavy rain and purple neon lighting from the city outside.
